summary: Comprehensive testing completed for AI Document Extraction and Matching Platform fixes. All requested features are working correctly: 1) Email credentials configuration with test connection button, 2) Document matching functionality with field-by-field comparison, 3) CSV export download, 4) Documents page displays extracted fields with confidence scores in side panel. Backend APIs achieve 100% success rate, frontend UI is fully functional with proper data flow integration.
passed_tests: All 13 backend API endpoints pass (100% success rate)
Email connection test endpoint (/api/configurations/{id}/test-email) working
Document matching endpoint (/api/documents/{id}/match) functional
Matching source data upload/retrieval working with test invoice numbers
Document re-extraction endpoint functional
CSV export endpoint working correctly
Documents page loads and displays 10 document rows with field badges
Document details side panel opens with extracted fields section
Confidence scores displayed properly (95%, 90%, 85%, 80% etc.)
Matching results section shows field-by-field comparison with scores
Matched record shows JSON data with invoice number 1534FMBIL0001803
Run Matching button clickable and functional
Re-extract with AI button working with success feedback
Export CSV button present and clickable
Search and filter functionality working
Configurations page loads with existing config card
Email tab shows Gmail app password instructions and credential fields
Test Connection button present and functional (shows auth failure with test creds)
Rules tab displays existing matching rules with proper configuration
Add Rule button adds new matching rules successfully
Configuration save functionality working
